title: Brave at a New School
lesson: Trying something new feels scary at first, but being brave helps you find new friends and fun.
prompts: At the front gate of a friendly school, soft morning light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands holding a small backpack, with a nervous, uncertain expression. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} holds their hand reassuringly. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At the front gate of a friendly school, soft morning light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands in the mid-ground, clutching the strap of their backpack, with a brave little smile. In the foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels and gestures encouragingly toward the school doors. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a colourful classroom doorway, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, giving a small, shy wave, with a hopeful expression. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_30_RACE_BLACK} stands welcoming them in with a warm wave. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. Eye-level medium-wide shot, bright friendly light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a bright classroom with posters and toys, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image takes a brave step inside alone, with a determined little smile, waving goodbye over one shoulder. Medium shot at eye level, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a bright classroom with posters and toys, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits at a craft table, with a happy, relaxed smile, holding a colourful paper drawing. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_ASIAN} sits beside them sharing crayons. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. If a prop is shared, show one shared prop linking their hands in one common space. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At the front gate of a friendly school, golden afternoon light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image runs directly toward {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneeling at the gate, with a big joyful smile and arms reaching forward. {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels at the gate facing the running child with open arms, proud and delighted. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: At the front gate of a friendly school in morning light, the child holds a small backpack, nervous and uncertain, while the mother holds their hand reassuringly.
At the school gate, the child clutches the backpack strap with a brave little smile while the mother kneels gesturing encouragingly toward the school doors.
At a colourful classroom doorway, the child gives a small shy wave, hopeful, while the teacher, a woman, welcomes them in with a warm wave.
Inside a bright classroom with posters and toys, the child takes a brave step in alone, determined, waving goodbye over one shoulder.
In the bright classroom at a craft table, the child holds a colourful paper drawing with a happy, relaxed smile while a new friend, a girl, shares crayons.
At the school gate in golden afternoon light, the child runs toward the gate with a big joyful smile while the mother kneels with open arms, proud — being brave found new friends.
texts: {NAME} stood at the gate of a new school, holding a backpack tight. "It feels so scary," said {NAME}. Mum held {NAME}'s hand.
Mum knelt down. "You can be brave," she said, pointing kindly to the door. "I'll try," said {NAME}, with a brave little smile.
At the classroom door, the teacher gave a warm wave. "Welcome! We're so happy you're here," she said. "Hello," said {NAME} shyly.
{NAME} took a brave step inside and waved goodbye. "Bye, Mum — I can do this!" said {NAME}.
At the craft table, a new friend shared her crayons. "Want to draw with me?" she asked. "Yes please!" said {NAME}. This was fun!
At the end of the day, {NAME} ran out happily into Mum's open arms. "I made a friend!" said {NAME}. Being brave had found new friends.
